title: Mardi Himal Trek
tagline: A short and scenic trek offering breathtaking close-up views of Machapuchare and the Annapurna range.
overview: The journey begins with a scenic drive from Pokhara to Siddhing, where the trekking trail gradually ascends through serene forests and traditional mountain villages. From Siddhing to Low Camp, the path winds through dense rhododendron and oak forests, offering occasional glimpses of the majestic Annapurna range. As you continue toward High Camp, the landscape transforms into an alpine environment surrounded by towering Himalayan peaks. From here, an early morning hike to the Mardi Himal Viewpoint (4,500m) rewards trekkers with a breathtaking sunrise over Machapuchare (Fishtail), Hiunchuli, and Annapurna South. The return journey descends through Forest Camp to Kalimati, passing lush woodlands and tranquil valleys rich in biodiversity before driving back to Pokhara.
includes: Airport arrival and departure transfers (private vehicle)
Kathmandu–Pokhara round-trip (flight or drive)
All necessary trekking permits and national park fees
Accommodation in tea houses during the trek
Full board meals during trekking (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)
Experienced English-speaking guide and porter
Staff salary, insurance, and logistics support
Duffel bag (kitbag) for trekking
All applicable government taxes
excludes: International airfare and Nepal visa fees
Accommodation and meals in Kathmandu
Beverages (soft drinks, alcohol, bottled water)
Entry fees for heritage sites, monasteries, and museums
Personal trekking gear and equipment
Personal expenses (Wi-Fi, phone calls, charging, laundry, hot showers, tips)
Travel insurance and emergency evacuation
Any services not mentioned in the Includes section

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrival at the airport and transfer to your hotel. Rest and prepare for the trek.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu → Pokhara
itinerary.description: A scenic drive through river valleys and rolling hills brings you to Pokhara, the gateway to the Annapurna region, where mountain views set the tone for the adventure ahead.

itinerary.title: Pokhara → Siddhing → Low Camp
itinerary.description: After a drive to Siddhing, the trek begins through terraced farmland and dense forests, gradually climbing to Low Camp surrounded by peaceful mountain landscapes.

itinerary.title: Low Camp → High Camp
itinerary.description: Today’s trek follows a ridge trail through rhododendron forests, opening up to breathtaking views of Machhapuchhre, Annapurna South, and the surrounding peaks as you reach High Camp.

itinerary.title: High Camp → Viewpoint → Rest Camp
itinerary.description: An early morning hike leads to the Mardi Himal Viewpoint for a spectacular sunrise over the Himalayas. After returning to High Camp for breakfast, the trail descends through alpine terrain to Rest Camp.

itinerary.title: Rest Camp → Kalimati → Pokhara
itinerary.description: The final day takes you through lush forests rich in birdlife, passing Forest Camp before reaching Kalimati, from where we drive back to Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Return from Pokhara to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Drive back to Kathmandu, enjoying the scenic landscapes along the way.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey.

fr.title: Trek du Mardi Himal
fr.tagline: Un trek court et panoramique offrant des vues rapprochées époustouflantes sur le Machapuchare et la chaîne des Annapurnas.
fr.overview: Le voyage commence par un trajet panoramique de Pokhara à Siddhing, où le sentier de randonnée monte progressivement à travers des forêts sereines et des villages de montagne traditionnels. De Siddhing à Low Camp, le chemin serpente à travers d'épaisses forêts de rhododendrons et de chênes, offrant des aperçus occasionnels de la majestueuse chaîne des Annapurnas. En continuant vers High Camp, le paysage se transforme en un environnement alpin entouré de sommets himalayens imposants. De là, une randonnée matinale au point de vue du Mardi Himal (4 500 m) récompense les randonneurs par un lever de soleil époustouflant sur le Machapuchare (Fishtail), le Hiunchuli et l'Annapurna Sud. Le voyage de retour descend par Forest Camp jusqu'à Kalimati, traversant des bois luxuriants et des vallées tranquilles riches en biodiversité avant de retourner à Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Arrivée à Katmandou
itinerary.description: Arrivée à l'aéroport et transfert à votre hôtel. Repos et préparation pour le trek.

itinerary.title: Katmandou → Pokhara
itinerary.description: Un trajet pittoresque à travers des vallées fluviales et des collines verdoyantes vous amène à Pokhara, la porte d'entrée de la région des Annapurnas.

itinerary.title: Pokhara → Siddhing → Low Camp
itinerary.description: Après un trajet jusqu'à Siddhing, le trek commence à travers des terres agricoles en terrasses et des forêts denses, montant progressivement vers Low Camp.

itinerary.title: Low Camp → High Camp
itinerary.location: Low Camp (2 970 m) → High Camp (3 580 m)
itinerary.description: Le trek d'aujourd'hui suit un sentier de crête à travers des forêts de rhododendrons, s'ouvrant sur des vues imprenables sur le Machapuchare et l'Annapurna Sud.

itinerary.title: High Camp → Point de vue → Rest Camp
itinerary.location: Point de vue (4 500 m) → Rest Camp (2 600 m)
itinerary.description: Une randonnée matinale mène au point de vue du Mardi Himal pour un lever de soleil spectaculaire sur l'Himalaya. Après le petit-déjeuner à High Camp, descente vers Rest Camp.

itinerary.title: Rest Camp → Kalimati → Pokhara
itinerary.description: La dernière journée vous emmène à travers des forêts luxuriantes riches en oiseaux, passant par Forest Camp avant d'atteindre Kalimati, d'où nous retournons à Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Retour de Pokhara à Katmandou
itinerary.description: Retour à Katmandou en profitant des paysages pittoresques en chemin.

itinerary.title: Départ
itinerary.description: Transfert à l'aéroport pour votre voyage de retour.

includes: Transferts d'arrivée et de départ de l'aéroport (véhicule privé)

Assurance voyage et évacuation d'urgence

es.title: Trek del Mardi Himal
es.tagline: Un trek corto y escénico que ofrece impresionantes vistas de cerca del Machapuchare y la cordillera del Annapurna.
es.overview: El viaje comienza con un viaje escénico desde Pokhara hasta Siddhing, donde el sendero de trekking asciende gradualmente a través de bosques serenos y pueblos de montaña tradicionales. De Siddhing a Low Camp, el camino serpentea a través de densos bosques de rododendros y robles, ofreciendo vislumbres ocasionales de la majestuosa cordillera del Annapurna. Al continuar hacia High Camp, el paisaje se transforma en un entorno alpino rodeado de imponentes picos del Himalaya. Desde aquí, una caminata matutina al mirador de Mardi Himal (4,500 m) recompensa a los excursionistas con un impresionante amanecer sobre Machapuchare (Fishtail), Hiunchuli y Annapurna South. El viaje de regreso desciende a través de Forest Camp hasta Kalimati, pasando por bosques exuberantes y valles tranquilos ricos en biodiversidad antes de conducir de regreso a Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Llegada a Katmandú
itinerary.description: Llegada al aeropuerto y traslado a su hotel. Descanso y preparación para el trek.

itinerary.title: Katmandú → Pokhara
itinerary.description: Un viaje escénico a través de valles fluviales y colinas ondulantes lo lleva a Pokhara, la puerta de entrada a la región de los Annapurnas.

itinerary.title: Pokhara → Siddhing → Low Camp
itinerary.description: Después de un viaje a Siddhing, el trek comienza a través de tierras de cultivo en terrazas y densos bosques, subiendo gradualmente a Low Camp.

itinerary.title: Low Camp → High Camp
itinerary.location: Low Camp (2,970 m) → High Camp (3,580 m)
itinerary.description: El trek de hoy sigue un sendero de cresta a través de bosques de rododendros, abriéndose a vistas impresionantes de Machhapuchhre y Annapurna Sur.

itinerary.title: High Camp → Mirador → Rest Camp
itinerary.description: Una caminata matutina conduce al mirador de Mardi Himal para un espectacular amanecer sobre el Himalaya. Después de regresar a High Camp para desayunar, el sendero desciende a Rest Camp.

itinerary.title: Rest Camp → Kalimati → Pokhara
itinerary.description: El último día lo lleva a través de bosques exuberantes ricos en aves, pasando por Forest Camp antes de llegar a Kalimati, desde donde regresamos a Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Regreso de Pokhara a Katmandú
itinerary.description: Viaje de regreso a Katmandú disfrutando de los paisajes escénicos en el camino.

itinerary.title: Salida
itinerary.description: Traslado al aeropuerto para su viaje de regreso.

includes: Traslados de llegada y salida del aeropuerto (vehículo privado)
Ida y vuelta Katmandú-Pokhara (vuelo o coche)

de.title: Mardi Himal Trek
de.tagline: Ein kurzer und malerischer Trek mit atemberaubenden Nahaufnahmen des Machapuchare und der Annapurna-Kette.
de.overview: Die Reise beginnt mit einer malerischen Fahrt von Pokhara nach Siddhing, wo der Wanderweg allmählich durch ruhige Wälder und traditionelle Bergdörfer ansteigt. Von Siddhing zum Low Camp schlängelt sich der Pfad durch dichte Rhododendron- und Eichenwälder und bietet gelegentliche Ausblicke auf die majestätische Annapurna-Kette. Auf dem Weg zum High Camp verwandelt sich die Landschaft in eine alpine Umgebung, umgeben von gewaltigen Himalaya-Gipfeln. Von hier aus belohnt eine frühmorgendliche Wanderung zum Mardi Himal Viewpoint (4.500 m) Wanderer mit einem atemberaubenden Sonnenaufgang über Machapuchare (Fishtail), Hiunchuli und Annapurna South. Die Rückreise führt durch das Forest Camp nach Kalimati, vorbei an üppigen Wäldern und ruhigen Tälern mit reicher Artenvielfalt, bevor es zurück nach Pokhara geht.

itinerary.title: Ankunft in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Ankunft am Flughafen und Transfer zu Ihrem Hotel. Ruhe und Vorbereitung auf den Trek.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu → Pokhara
itinerary.description: Eine malerische Fahrt durch Flusstäler und sanfte Hügel bringt Sie nach Pokhara, dem Tor zur Annapurna-Region.

itinerary.title: Pokhara → Siddhing → Low Camp
itinerary.description: Nach einer Fahrt nach Siddhing beginnt der Trek durch terrassiertes Ackerland und dichte Wälder und steigt allmählich zum Low Camp an.

itinerary.title: Low Camp → High Camp
itinerary.location: Low Camp (2.970 m) → High Camp (3.580 m)
itinerary.description: Die heutige Wanderung folgt einem Gratweg durch Rhododendronwälder und eröffnet atemberaubende Ausblicke auf Machhapuchhre und Annapurna South.

itinerary.title: High Camp → Aussichtspunkt → Rest Camp
itinerary.description: Eine frühmorgendliche Wanderung führt zum Mardi Himal Viewpoint für einen spektakulären Sonnenaufgang über dem Himalaya. Nach der Rückkehr zum High Camp zum Frühstück führt der Weg zum Rest Camp hinunter.

itinerary.title: Rest Camp → Kalimati → Pokhara
itinerary.description: Der letzte Tag führt Sie durch üppige Wälder mit reicher Vogelwelt, vorbei am Forest Camp nach Kalimati, von wo wir zurück nach Pokhara fahren.

itinerary.title: Rückkehr von Pokhara nach Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Fahrt zurück nach Kathmandu, wobei Sie die malerische Landschaft genießen.

itinerary.title: Abreise
itinerary.description: Transfer zum Flughafen für Ihre Weiterreise.

includes: Flughafentransfers bei Ankunft und Abreise (Privatfahrzeug)

title: Everest Base Camp Trek
tagline: Explore the Heart of the Himalayas on the Iconic Everest Base Camp Trek
overview: The Everest Base Camp trek is the world’s most iconic multi-day adventure—and for good reason. Journey deep into the heart of the Himalayas as the trail climbs to 5,643 meters above sea level, unveiling breathtaking, close-up views of the world’s highest peak. Along the way, immerse yourself in the rich Sherpa culture of the Khumbu region—prayer flags fluttering in the wind, ancient monasteries, and mountain villages that feel timeless. Every step of this legendary trek offers raw beauty, deep connection, and memories that will stay with you long after the journey ends. The Everest Base Camp trek is a once-in-a-lifetime adventure, combining stunning Himalayan landscapes with a deep immersion into Sherpa culture. With guides born and raised in the Everest region, A Little More Altitude ensures every step is safe, meaningful, and unforgettable.
includes: Airport pick-up and drop-off facility
Hotel accommodation in Kathmandu (4 nights, bed & breakfast, twin bedroom)

Porters (1 porter for 2 trekkers)
Staff salary and allowance
Comprehensive Medical kits

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrival at Tribhuvan International Airport, Kathmandu and transfer to the hotel.

itinerary.title: Preparation Day
itinerary.description: Preparation day in Kathmandu, gear check and safety/trip briefing, before a team meal.

itinerary.title: Flight to Lukla and Trek to Phakding
itinerary.description: Flight to Lukla at 2846m and then a stunning short trek to Phakding that takes three to four hours.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche Bazaar
itinerary.description: A five to six-hour trek from Phakding to Namche, crossing the famous Hillary Bridge with a nice climb into Namche Bazaar for a team dinner.

itinerary.title: Acclimatisation in Namche
itinerary.description: Acclimatisation day in Namche, including a short two to three-hour hike to Everest View Hotel, and then a visit to Sagarmatha National Park Museum for one to two hours.

itinerary.title: Trek to Debuche
itinerary.description: A four to six-hour trek from Namche to Debuche via a visit to Tengboche Monastery, as well as an hour lunch stop.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dingboche
itinerary.description: Trek from Debuche to Dingboche for four to six hours, as well as a lunch stop.

itinerary.title: Acclimatisation in Dingboche
itinerary.description: Acclimatisation day in Dingboche, including a four to five-hour hike up to Nagarjun Hill hours with an incredible view of Ama Dablam. This is followed by team dinner and rest in Dingboche.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lobouche
itinerary.description: A four to six-hour trek from Dingboche to Lobouche via Thukla Everest Memorial Pass, including an hour lunch stop.

itinerary.title: Gorak Shep and Everest Base Camp
itinerary.description: An early morning trek from Lobuche to Gorak Shep and Everest Base Camp, before heading back to Gorak Shep for an overnight stay. This stage takes six to eight hours.

itinerary.title: Kala Patthar and Trek to Pheriche
itinerary.description: An early morning hike to Kalapathar and trek to Pheriche. This takes four to six hours, with a lunch stop of approximately one hour.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche Bazaar
itinerary.description: A six to eight-hour trek from Pheriche to Namche, with an hour lunch stop.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lukla
itinerary.description: Trek from Namche to Lukla for four to six hours, with a lunch break of one hour. You will spend the night in Lukla, one of the world's highest-altitude airports.

itinerary.title: Fly to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Fly back to Kathmandu and relax and unwind from a memorable trip.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Leisure day in Kathmandu sightseeing and exploring.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Departure day and drop off at Tribhuvan International Airport.

title: Manaslu Circuit Trek
tagline: Journey Through the Remote Himalayas on the Epic Manaslu Circuit Trek.
overview: The Manaslu Circuit Trek is a thrilling journey through one of Nepal’s most remote and untouched regions, circling the majestic Manaslu (8,163m), the world’s eighth-highest peak. With guides born and raised in the Himalayas, we take you through traditional villages, ancient monasteries, lush forests, and high alpine landscapes, offering an authentic glimpse into local culture and mountain life. The highlight of the trek is the Larkya La Pass at 5,160m, offering awe-inspiring 360-degree views of snow-capped peaks and glaciers. After crossing the pass, you descend into Bimtang, a peaceful high-altitude village surrounded by majestic mountains. The journey continues through Tilije, passing tranquil valleys and rivers, completing 14 days of adventure that combines high-altitude trekking, cultural immersion, and the stunning natural beauty of the Manaslu region.
includes: International arrival and departure transfers in private vehicle
Kathmandu - Jagat / Besi Sahar - Kathmandu transfer in private vehicle

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kathmandu and transfer to your hotel. Meet the team, relax, and prepare for the journey ahead.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kathmandu to Jagat
itinerary.description: A scenic drive through hills, rivers, and rural villages brings us to Jagat, the starting point of our trek.

itinerary.title: Trek from Jagat to Deng
itinerary.description: The trek begins along the Budhi Gandaki River, passing suspension bridges, waterfalls, and traditional villages.

itinerary.title: Trek from Deng to Namrung
itinerary.description: Today’s trail climbs steadily through forests and stone villages as we enter the upper Manaslu region.

itinerary.title: Trek from Namrung to Lho / Shyala
itinerary.description: Enjoy spectacular views of Manaslu and surrounding peaks while trekking through beautiful alpine villages.

itinerary.title: Trek from Lho/Shyala to Samagaun
itinerary.description: A scenic and culturally rich day visiting Pungyen Gompa before reaching the peaceful village of Samagaun.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Day in Samagaun
itinerary.description: Rest and adapt to the altitude with optional hikes to Manaslu Base Camp or Birendra Lake.

itinerary.title: Trek from Samagaun to Samdo
itinerary.description: A short and gentle trek through open landscapes as we approach the Tibetan border region.

itinerary.title: Trek from Samdo to Dharmasala
itinerary.description: Gradual ascent through high alpine terrain leads us to Dharmasala, the base of Larkya La Pass.

itinerary.title: Cross Larkya La Pass and Trek to Bhimtang
itinerary.description: The most challenging and rewarding day, crossing Larkya La Pass with breathtaking Himalayan views before descending to Bhimtang.

itinerary.title: Trek from Bhimtang to Tilije
itinerary.description: Descend through rhododendron forests and alpine meadows into warmer valleys and villages.

itinerary.title: Trek & Drive from Tilije to Besisahar
itinerary.description: A short walk to the road followed by a scenic drive out of the mountains.

itinerary.title: Drive from Besisahar to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Return to Kathmandu, reflecting on an unforgettable Himalayan journey.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey home.

title: Langtang Valley Trek
tagline: A breathtaking journey through glaciers, Himalayan peaks, and rich flora and fauna.
overview: Langtang Valley, north of Kathmandu in Langtang National Park, spans 1,710 sq km of dense forest. The area is famous for the Langtang Lirung (7,345m), glaciers, Himalayan peaks, and rich flora and fauna. Rated as an easy family trek, it has no difficult climbs or extreme cold. Trek along the Langtang River through rhododendron forests to Kyanjin Gompa, passing waterfalls, wild bee hives, and high yak pastures. Visit one of Nepal’s oldest Swiss cheese factories and the ancient Kyanjin Gompa. A walk to Khyimsung Glacier offers a memorable experience. The local people are mostly of Tibetan origin

itinerary.title: Drive to Khangjim
itinerary.description: Duration: 7–8 hours. Begin with a scenic drive from Kathmandu to Khangjim, passing through Trishuli Bazaar and Syafrubesi. The route offers beautiful river valleys, terraced fields, and glimpses of rural life before reaching the trailhead.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lama Hotel
itinerary.description: Duration: 6–7 hours. The trek starts with a gradual ascent through rhododendron and oak forests, crossing suspension bridges and traditional villages. Arrive at Lama Hotel, a serene settlement surrounded by dense forest.

itinerary.title: Trek to Langtang Village
itinerary.description: Trekking Hours: 6–7 hours. Follow the Langtang River upstream through lush forests until the valley opens wide. The trail offers stunning views of Langtang Lirung and leads to Langtang Village, rebuilt after the Devastating earthquake in 2015.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Day in Langtang Village
itinerary.description: Spend a full day acclimatizing to the altitude. Optional short hikes around the village or visits to local yak pastures help the body adjust while providing cultural and scenic insight.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kyangjin Gompa
itinerary.description: Trekking Hours: 3–4 hours. A gentle and scenic walk-through meadows, prayer wheels, and mani walls brings you to Kyangjin Gompa, the spiritual heart of the region. Enjoy panoramic views and the peaceful atmosphere of the valley.

itinerary.title: Hike to Kyangjin Ri or Tsergo Ri
itinerary.description: Trekking Hours: Kyangjin Ri: 5–7 hours round trip Tsergo Ri: 8–10 hours round trip Climb to one of the high viewpoints for remarkable 360° views of Langtang Lirung, Dorje Lakpa, and surrounding snow peaks. This is one of the most rewarding days of the trek.

itinerary.title: Exploration Day in Kyangjin Gompa
itinerary.description: A flexible day for recovery and exploration. Options include visiting the local monastery, walking to the glacier viewpoint or touring the famous yak cheese factory. This additional day enhances acclimatization and enjoyment.

itinerary.title: Trek Back to Lama Hotel
itinerary.description: Trekking Hours: 6–7 hours. Descend through the Langtang Valley, retracing your steps past meadows, forests, and rivers. The downhill walk is comfortable and offers a different perspective of the landscape.

itinerary.title: Trek to Khangjim
itinerary.description: Trekking Hours: 5–6 hours. Continue descending through dense forests and traditional settlements until you arrive at Syafrubesi, marking the end of the trekking trail.

itinerary.title: Drive to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Duration: 6–7 hours. Return to Kathmandu by road, concluding your journey through one of Nepal’s most culturally rich and naturally beautiful valleys.

itinerary.title: Depart Kathmandu
itinerary.description: It's time to say farewell to Nepal. Enjoy your last moments in Kathmandu with breakfast in a café, a final stroll through the narrow alleys and temples, and some final souvenir shopping. A driver will be waiting for you at your hotel to take you to the airport for your return flight home. It's best to be at the airport at least two hours prior to departure.

title: Annapurna Base Camp Trek
tagline: A breathtaking journey into the Annapurna Sanctuary surrounded by towering Himalayan peaks and rich local culture.
overview: The Annapurna Base Camp Trek is a journey into the heart of the Himalayas, where every step feels intimate, powerful, and unforgettable. The trail weaves through terraced fields, lush rhododendron forests, and warm Gurung villages before opening into the dramatic Annapurna Sanctuary—a natural amphitheater surrounded by towering giants like Annapurna I, Machapuchare, Hiunchuli, and Annapurna South. Reaching base camp at 4,130m, you stand encircled by snow-covered peaks, witnessing golden sunrises and silent Himalayan nights that leave a lasting imprint on the soul. What makes this trek truly special is its perfect balance of culture, comfort, and high-mountain adventure—offering deep immersion without extreme difficulty. The Annapurna Base Camp Trek isn’t just about reaching a destination; it’s about feeling the mountains breathe around you and carrying that connection long after the journey ends.
includes: Arrival and departure: We offer a pick-and-drop facility from the airport to your hotel, and vice versa

Member luggage: Up to 15kg per member for personal baggage during the trek carrying by porters
Lodging and food: Three meals a day (including tea and coffee) along with accessible accommodation at hotels and lodges during the trek

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrive in Nepal’s vibrant capital and transfer to your hotel. Depending on arrival time, explore the lively streets, heritage sites, or relax after your journey.

itinerary.title: Fly to Pokhara – Drive to Ghandruk
itinerary.description: Enjoy a scenic flight to Pokhara, followed by a drive to the traditional Gurung village of Ghandruk. Walk through stone-paved alleys and enjoy stunning views of Annapurna South and Machhapuchhre.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghandruk to Chhomrong
itinerary.description: Descend through terraced farmlands and cross suspension bridges before climbing to Chhomrong, the gateway to Annapurna Sanctuary with panoramic mountain views.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chhomrong to Dovan
itinerary.description: The trail passes through dense bamboo and rhododendron forests, following the Modi Khola upstream as the landscape gradually becomes more alpine and remote.

itinerary.title: Trek to Annapurna Base Camp via Machhapuchhre Base Camp
itinerary.description: A highlight day of the trek. Walk into the Annapurna Sanctuary, stopping at Machhapuchhre Base Camp before reaching Annapurna Base Camp, surrounded by towering Himalayan peaks.

itinerary.title: Trek from Annapurna Base Camp to Bamboo
itinerary.description: Wake early for a magical sunrise over the Annapurna range, then descend through glacial valleys and forests to Bamboo.

itinerary.title: Trek from Bamboo to Jhinu Danda
itinerary.description: Retrace your steps through lush forests to Jhinu Danda, where you can relax your muscles in the natural hot springs beside the river.

itinerary.title: Drive to Pokhara – Fly to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: After breakfast, drive back to Pokhara and take a scenic flight to Kathmandu, marking the end of your trekking adventure and farewell dinner in Kathmandu

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.description: Departure to your home country, carrying unforgettable memories from the Himalayas.

title: Annapurna Circuit Trek
tagline: A journey through the Annapurna Himalayas, crossing high passes, serene villages, and spectacular lakes, including the legendary Thorong La Pass and Tilicho Lake.
overview: Embarking on the Annapurna Circuit Trek is an adventure of a lifetime. From lush subtropical valleys to rugged high-altitude landscapes, this trek offers unparalleled Himalayan vistas, cultural encounters with local Gurung and Manangi communities, and the thrill of crossing the mighty Thorong La Pass at 5,416 meters. One of the highlights of this trek is Tilicho Lake, one of the highest lakes in the world, nestled at 4,920 meters amidst towering peaks—a serene and breathtaking spectacle that feels like a hidden gem in the mountains. Along the way, trekkers also witness turquoise glacial lakes, soaring peaks, and serene villages that seem frozen in time. Each day brings a new challenge, new views, and memories that last forever—a true celebration of nature and human endurance.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrive in Nepal’s vibrant capital, transfer to your hotel, and prepare for the adventure ahead. Welcome dinner & briefing about the trek.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Dharapani
itinerary.description: Drive through scenic valleys, rivers, and terraced fields, entering the Annapurna region with your first taste of Himalayan landscapes. (8–9 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Dharapani to Chame
itinerary.description: Trek through pine forests and small villages, with views of Annapurna II and Lamjung Himal along the trail. (5–6 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Chame to Pisang
itinerary.description: Climb gradually through terraced fields to the traditional village of Pisang, with dramatic cliffs and the Pisang Peak backdrop. (4–5 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Pisang to Manang
itinerary.description: Enter the high Himalayas, walking past dry landscapes and prayer wheels, with Manang valley opening up before you. (6–7 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Acclimatization in Manang
itinerary.description: Take a rest day to adjust to altitude. Optional short hikes to nearby viewpoints and glaciers, enjoying panoramic mountain vistas.

itinerary.title: Manang to Tilicho Base Camp
itinerary.description: Trek along rugged trails through rocky terrain to the base of Tilicho Lake, surrounded by towering Himalayan peaks. (5–6 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Tilicho Lake Hike & Trek to Shree Kharka
itinerary.description: Hike to the stunning Tilicho Lake, one of the highest lakes in the world, then descend to Shree Kharka for overnight. (7–8 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Shree Kharka to Thorong Phedi
itinerary.description: Trek through high-altitude landscapes, stone walls, and small villages, preparing for the challenge of Thorong La Pass. (7–8 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Thorong Phedi – Thorong La Pass to Muktinath
itinerary.description: Early morning ascent to the legendary Thorong La Pass. Enjoy panoramic views and descend to the sacred town of Muktinath. (7–9 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Muktinath to Tatopani
itinerary.description: Drive through deep valleys to Tatopani, known for its natural hot springs—perfect to relax aching muscles. (5–6 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Tatopani to Ghorepani
itinerary.description: Trek through rhododendron forests and charming villages, climbing gradually to the hilltop village of Ghorepani. (7–8 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Poon Hill – Nayapul – Pokhara
itinerary.description: Early morning hike to Poon Hill for a breathtaking sunrise over Annapurna and Dhaulagiri ranges. Descend to Nayapul and drive to lakeside Pokhara. (7–8 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Pokhara to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Take a scenic flight to Kathmandu, marking the end of your trekking adventure and farewell dinner in Kathmandu. (6–7 hrs.)

itinerary.title: Departure from Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your final flight home, carrying unforgettable memories of the Annapurna Circuit.

title: Gokyo Valley Trek
tagline: A serene Himalayan adventure through pristine alpine landscapes, turquoise glacial lakes, and panoramic mountain vistas including Everest, Cho Oyu, Lhotse, and Makalu.
overview: The Gokyo Valley Trek is a stunning alternative to the classic Everest Base Camp route, taking you deep into the heart of the Everest region while offering quieter trails, pristine alpine landscapes, and breathtaking turquoise glacial lakes. This trek showcases panoramic views of Everest, Cho Oyu, Lhotse, Makalu, and the massive Ngozumpa Glacier, combined with rich Sherpa culture and traditional mountain villages. The highlight of the trek is the ascent of Gokyo Ri, one of the best viewpoints in the Himalayas.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kathmandu, where you’ll be welcomed and briefed about the trek. Time to rest, explore the city, and prepare for the journey ahead.

itinerary.title: Flight to Lukla & Trek to Phakding
itinerary.description: A scenic mountain flight takes you to Lukla. From here, the trek begins with an easy walk through Sherpa villages and along the Dudh Koshi River to reach Phakding.

itinerary.title: Trek from Phakding to Namche Bazaar
itinerary.description: The trail follows the river, crosses suspension bridges, and gradually climbs to Namche Bazaar, the vibrant capital of the Khumbu region.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Day in Namche Bazaar
itinerary.description: A rest and acclimatization day with short hikes and sightseeing around Namche, helping your body adjust to altitude.

itinerary.title: Trek from Namche Bazaar to Dole
itinerary.description: Leaving the main Everest trail, we head toward the quieter Gokyo route, trekking through forests and alpine terrain to the peaceful village of Dole.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dole to Machhermo
itinerary.description: The trail ascends gradually through open valleys and yak pastures, offering beautiful mountain views before reaching Machhermo.

itinerary.title: Trek from Machhermo to Gokyo
itinerary.description: Today we reach Gokyo Valley, passing beside the stunning turquoise glacial lakes with views of the Ngozumpa Glacier and surrounding peaks.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Gokyo – Hike to Gokyo Ri
itinerary.description: An early morning hike to Gokyo Ri rewards you with one of the best panoramic views in the Himalayas before spending the rest of the day relaxing in Gokyo.

itinerary.title: Trek from Gokyo to Dole
itinerary.description: We retrace our steps, descending through familiar trails and alpine landscapes back to Dole.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dole to Namche Bazaar
itinerary.description: Continuing downhill, we rejoin the main trail and return to the lively hub of Namche Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Trek from Namche Bazaar to Lukla
itinerary.description: The final trekking day takes us back through villages and suspension bridges to Lukla, where we celebrate the completion of the trek.

itinerary.title: Flight from Lukla to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: An early morning flight returns us to Kathmandu, marking the end of an unforgettable Himalayan journey.

title: Pikey Peak & Dudh Kunda Trek
tagline: A journey through Sherpa villages, sacred monasteries, panoramic peaks, and the holy alpine lake of Dudh Kunda.
overview: The Pikey Peak & Dudh Kunda Trek is a hidden-gem journey through the lesser-explored Solu Khumbu region, offering a rare blend of panoramic Himalayan views, deep Sherpa culture, and sacred alpine landscapes. From the breathtaking sunrise at Pikey Peak—widely regarded as one of the best viewpoints in lower Everest—to the spiritual serenity of the holy Dudh Kunda Lake beneath Numbur Himal, this trek takes you far beyond the crowded trails. Walking through traditional villages, ancient monasteries, high forests, and remote valleys, the journey offers an authentic mountain experience guided by Sherpa roots and local knowledge, making it ideal for trekkers seeking both adventure and cultural depth.
includes: International arrival and departure transfers in private vehicle.
Trek permit fees and NP fees required for the trek.
Accommodation in tea houses during the trek.
Meals on full board basis during the trek (Breakfast, lunch, and dinner)
English speaking local expert guide and porter on the trek.
Salary and insurance for staffs.
Kitbags (Duffel Bag)
All government taxes.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kathmandu and transfer to your hotel. Meet the team, receive a trek briefing while soaking in the vibrant energy of Nepal’s capital.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kathmandu to Dhap
itinerary.description: A scenic drive through hills, rivers, and rural settlements brings you to Dhap, the gateway to the lower Solu region and the start of the trek. (7–8 hours)

itinerary.title: Trek from Dhap to Bulbule
itinerary.description: The trek begins through forests, yak pastures, and traditional villages, offering your first real taste of Sherpa mountain life. (5–6 hours)

itinerary.title: Trek from Bulbule to Pikey Peak Base Camp
itinerary.description: Gradual ascent through rhododendron forests and open ridgelines leads to Pikey Base Camp with stunning Himalayan views. (5–6 hours)

itinerary.title: Pikey Base Camp to Junbesi via Pikey Peak
itinerary.description: Early morning hike to Pikey Peak, one of the best viewpoints in Nepal, offering sunrise views of Everest, Makalu, Lhotse, and Kanchenjunga. Descend to the beautiful Sherpa village of Junbesi. (7–8 hours)

itinerary.title: Junbesi – Monastery Visit & Rest Day
itinerary.description: Visit Thupten Choling Monastery, one of the largest monasteries in the region. A relaxed day for acclimatization, cultural immersion, and village exploration. (2–3 hours)

itinerary.title: Drive to Taksindu & Trek to Kamu Dada
itinerary.description: A short drive followed by a peaceful trek through forested trails leading to the quiet ridge of Kamu Dada. (3–4 hours walk)

itinerary.title: Trek from Kamu Dada to Beni
itinerary.description: The trail becomes more remote and rugged as you move deeper toward the sacred Dudh Kunda region, surrounded by alpine landscapes. (4–5 hours)

itinerary.title: Hike to Dudh Kunda Lake & Return to Beni
itinerary.description: An early start leads to Dudh Kunda, a holy glacial lake revered by both Buddhists and Hindus. Spend time at the lake before descending back to Beni. (~5 hours)

itinerary.title: Trek from Beni to Taksindu
itinerary.description: A long descent through alpine meadows and forest trails, retracing steps toward lower elevations. (6–7 hours)

itinerary.title: Trek from Taksindu to Phaplu
itinerary.description: An easy final trekking day through villages and farmland, ending at Phaplu. (~3 hours)

itinerary.title: Drive from Phaplu to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Drive back to Kathmandu, enjoying the changing landscapes from mountains to valleys. (8–9 hours)

itinerary.title: Rest & Sightseeing in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Free day to explore Kathmandu’s cultural sites, cafes, and local markets, or simply rest after the trek.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey, carrying memories of two of Nepal’s most soulful trekking destinations.
